meta.title: David Kim | Digital Designer
meta.description: Portfolio of David Kim, Digital Designer focused on UX/UI, branding, social media, web design, and digital products.

hero.name: Digital Designer creating brands and experiences that convert.
hero.title: UX/UI, branding, social media, and web design with strategic direction, strong aesthetics, and measurable outcomes.

about.title: About
about.heading: I am David Kim, a Digital Designer specialized in building consistent visual presence from branding to digital products.
about.description: I work across branding, visual identity, UX/UI, social media, and web design, connecting strategy and execution to build memorable brands and efficient interfaces.

summary.title: About / Professional Summary
summary.text: UX/UI and Product Designer with experience in digital design and web and mobile product development. Working as a freelance designer since 2021, creating interfaces, visual identities, and digital solutions for a range of clients and projects. Also has experience developing web and mobile applications, with front-end, back-end, and database knowledge, enabling end-to-end participation in digital product creation, from concept to delivery. Focused on creating intuitive, scalable, and visually consistent digital experiences by connecting design, technology, and product strategy.

bullets: Created visual and digital solutions for different clients and projects.
Developed visual identities, logos, and branding assets.
Produced creative materials for social media and digital campaigns.
Designed layouts for websites and landing pages.
Built digital interfaces focused on user experience.
Used Adobe Creative Cloud tools such as Photoshop, Illustrator, and After Effects.
Integrated design, digital marketing, and user experience practices.
Developed cross-platform applications using Flutter and Dart.
Created interfaces and features for mobile and web applications.
Integrated applications with APIs and backend services.
Worked with databases such as Firebase and Supabase.
Applied software development and architecture best practices.
Designed user-centered digital interfaces and experiences.
Created wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity layouts.
Structured navigation flows and information architecture.
Applied user-centered design methodologies.
Developed interactive prototypes for web and mobile applications.
Worked as a tutor and teacher supporting students in their learning process.
Provided educational guidance and monitored academic activities.
Developed communication, teaching, and student interaction skills.
Provided technical support and maintenance activities.

designExperience.title: Design Experience
items: Created digital interfaces focused on UX/UI and navigation clarity.
Developed wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity layouts.
Built visual identity, branding systems, and communication assets.

developmentExperience.title: Development Experience
items: Built responsive websites using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Used JavaScript and TypeScript for dynamic interactions.
Developed cross-platform applications with Flutter and Dart.
Integrated REST APIs and handled JSON data workflows.
Used Firebase, Supabase, and MySQL in backend and data scenarios.
Connected front-end, back-end, and database layers in web and mobile products.

items.description: Competencies in user research, information architecture, user-centered design, wireframes, and interactive prototyping.

items.description: Expertise in motion graphics, visual effects, interface animations, and video production for social media.

items.description: Mastery of vector design, logo creation, illustrations, and visual composition with advanced layer and drawing tool usage.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Projects organized by specialty to show both depth and range across digital design work.

list.name: Real Estate Platform
list.problem: Confusing interface and low qualified lead conversion.
list.solution: Full journey redesign with simplified navigation, clear filters, and decision-oriented visual hierarchy.
list.result: More intuitive experience and stronger commercial lead generation.

list.name: Studio Move Rebranding
list.problem: Brand lacked differentiation and visual language consistency across channels.
list.solution: Complete visual repositioning with a new logo, color system, typography, and application guide.
list.result: Stronger premium perception and more consistent brand communication.

list.name: Launch Week Social Campaign
list.problem: Low engagement and campaign pieces disconnected from the offer narrative.
list.solution: Created a campaign-driven visual system with modular templates and staged storytelling.
list.result: Higher visual consistency, better reach performance, and improved engagement rates.

list.name: IBK Institutional Website
list.problem: Previous website had weak structure, poor readability, and unclear navigation.
list.solution: Redesigned core pages with stronger visual hierarchy and improved information clarity.
list.result: More fluid navigation and a more professional institutional presence.

process.title: Process
process.description: A clear framework that turns business goals into strong visual and digital solutions.

steps.title: Research
steps.description: Understand brand context, audience, and business goals.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.description: Define direction, priorities, and visual opportunities.

steps.title: Concept
steps.description: Build concepts aligned with positioning and usability.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Develop high-quality visual assets and interface systems.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.description: Finalize files, guidelines, and implementation support.

list.quote: David delivered highly professional and strategic work.

list.quote: The new visual direction made our brand clearer and more valuable.
